name: RightWay Auto Sales
description_short: RightWay Auto Sales is a used car dealership offering in-house auto financing for buyers with all credit types, including bad credit, bankruptcy, and no credit.
description_long:
RightWay Auto Sales operates as a used car dealership with integrated auto financing, not a personal loan lender. The company has been serving customers for 28 years and claims a Top 5 ranking among used car dealers in the nation, with an A+ BBB rating and 77,000+ customer reviews averaging 4.8 stars. The Cincinnati location (Beechmont Ohio Pike) is situated at 770 OH-125 in Union Township, OH.

The company specializes in helping buyers with all credit profiles—including good credit, bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, repossession, and SSI/disability income—secure financing to purchase used vehicles. They offer vehicles ranging from 2013-2024 models, with hundreds of SUVs, trucks, and cars in inventory. Financing terms include down payments as low as $0, up to 84-month financing options, and access to 30+ lenders (banks, credit unions, and finance companies). The online application process takes approximately 3 minutes and claims no impact to credit scores.

RightWay differentiates itself through included peace-of-mind assurances: a 6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point safety inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance on all vehicles. They also offer trade-in services, vehicle appraisals, and a trade-in/upgrade program. The dealership emphasizes hassle-free, judgment-free customer service with flexible payment terms tailored to individual budgets and income levels.

While RightWay presents itself as customer-friendly with competitive features, potential buyers should note that as a traditional auto dealership, actual interest rates, total cost of borrowing, and long-term affordability depend on individual credit profiles and lender terms. The emphasis on "easy approvals" and "all credit types" suggests higher-risk lending, which typically correlates with higher APRs. The 84-month financing term, while lowering monthly payments, extends total loan duration and interest costs significantly.
pros: A+ BBB rating with 77,000+ customer reviews averaging 4.8 stars
$0 down payment option available for approved buyers
Access to 30+ competing lenders (banks, credit unions, finance companies) for better rate shopping
6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point safety inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance included
Online application in 3 minutes with no reported credit score impact
Serves all credit profiles: good credit, bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, repossession, SSI/disability
Flexible financing up to 84 months with payment estimates available online
Large inventory of 3,000+ vehicles ranging from 2013-2024 models
cons: As a subprime auto lender targeting bad credit/no credit borrowers, interest rates are likely substantially higher than prime lenders
84-month financing terms significantly extend total loan duration and cumulative interest costs despite lower monthly payments
Limited warranty (6 months/6,000 miles) is shorter than manufacturer warranties on newer vehicles
No specific APR, interest rate range, or payment examples provided on website, making true cost comparison difficult
Trade-in valuation process and actual loan approval terms dependent on credit profile and lender discretion
best_for: Buyers with bad credit, no credit, or recent bankruptcy seeking immediate vehicle financing
Those needing affordable monthly payments and willing to accept longer loan terms and higher interest rates
Consumers in the Cincinnati, OH area without access to prime auto lending or traditional dealership financing
Buyers prioritizing peace-of-mind assurances (warranty, roadside assistance) over lowest total loan cost
diagnosis: RightWay Auto Sales is best suited for borrowers with damaged credit, no credit history, or recent negative events (bankruptcy, repossession) who need immediate vehicle financing and prioritize accessibility over lowest total cost. The primary caveat is that subprime auto lending typically involves substantially higher interest rates and longer loan terms; borrowers should obtain specific APR quotes and calculate total interest costs before committing, as 84-month financing can result in paying significantly more than the vehicle's actual value.
services: Used vehicle sales (2013-2024 models) across SUVs, trucks, and sedans
Subprime auto financing for all credit types (bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, repossession)
Access to 30+ competing lenders for rate and term comparison
Down payment assistance ($0 down options available)
Trade-in vehicle appraisal and buyback services
Trade-in/upgrade program for existing vehicle owners
Payment estimation tools and flexible budget-based payment plans
